zh.lifeSummary: 當John Trussell於大約1280年出生在英國斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同時，他的父親William De Trussell21歲，母親Matilda Mainwaring2歲。他和Alianore Trussell至少有1個女兒。他去世於1349年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Trussell于大约1280年出生在英国斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同时，他的父亲William De Trussell21岁，母亲Matilda Mainwaring2岁。他和Alianore Trussell至少有1个女儿。他去世于1349年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Trussell was born about 1280, in Kibblestone, Staffordshire, England, his father, William De Trussell, was 21 and his mother, Matilda Mainwaring, was 2. He had at least 1 daughter with Alianore Trussell. He died in 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Trussell est né environ 1280, à Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Trussell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Matilda Mainwaring, avait 2 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alianore Trussell. Il est décédé en 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Trussell um 1280 in Kibblestone, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Trussell 21 und seine Mutter Matilda Mainwaring 2. Er hatte mit Alianore Trussell mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Trussell è nato il circa 1280 nel Kibblestone, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William De Trussell, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Mainwaring, aveva 2 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alianore Trussell. Morì nel 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Trussellが約1280年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアキブレストーンで生まれた時，父William De Trussellは21歳，母Matilda Mainwaringは2歳であった。彼はAlianore Trussellとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Trussell(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 스태퍼드실르 키브블레스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Trussell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Mainwaring(은)는 2세였다. 그는 Alianore Trussell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Trussell nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Trussell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Mainwaring, tinha 2 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alianore Trussell. Ele faleceu em 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Trussell родился около 1280 г. в местности кибблестоун, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Trussell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda Mainwaring, 2. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alianore Trussell. Он умер в 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Trussell nació aproximadamente 1280, en Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Trussell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Matilda Mainwaring, tenía 2 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alianore Trussell. Murió en 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
